OMC implements \"ralplan\" as: Consensus planning entrypoint that auto-gates vague ralph/autopilot/team requests before execution
OMC implements \"release\" as: Generic release assistant — analyzes repo release rules, caches them in .omc/RELEASE_RULE.md, then guides the release
OMC implements \"remember\" as: Review reusable project knowledge and decide what belongs in project memory, notepad, or durable docs
OMC implements \"sciomc\" as: Orchestrate parallel scientist agents for comprehensive analysis with AUTO mode
OMC implements \"self-improve\" as: Autonomous evolutionary code improvement engine with tournament selection
OMC implements \"setup\" as: Use first for install/update routing — sends setup, doctor, or MCP requests to the correct OMC setup flow
OMC implements \"skill\" as: Manage local skills - list, add, remove, search, edit, setup wizard
OMC implements \"skillify\" as: Turn a repeatable workflow from the current session into a reusable OMC skill draft
OMC implements \"team\" as: N coordinated agents on shared task list using Claude Code native teams
OMC implements \"trace\" as: Evidence-driven tracing lane that orchestrates competing tracer hypotheses in Claude built-in team mode
OMC implements \"ultraqa\" as: QA cycling workflow - test, verify, fix, repeat until goal met
OMC implements \"ultrawork\" as: Parallel execution engine for high-throughput task completion
OMC implements \"verify\" as: Verify that a change really works before you claim completion
OMC implements \"visual-verdict\" as: Structured visual QA verdict for screenshot-to-reference comparisons
OMC implements \"wiki\" as: LLM Wiki — persistent markdown knowledge base that compounds across sessions (Karpathy model)
OMC implements \"writer-memory\" as: Agentic memory system for writers - track characters, relationships, scenes, and themes
Exactly one default message template may exist per notification type; creating a second default is rejected, but editing the existing default is allowed
Organization deletion uses a 30-day grace period before permanent removal (DELETE_ORGANIZATION_INTERVAL_DAYS).
Vendor engines (OZ Report, Crystal, Jasper-Pro) often hard-code license file search paths - pin the path in the image and document it, or you will ship it broken repeatedly
Spring Data Page is immutable — Page.map() returns a new instance; forgetting to reassign silently loses the mapping
Period.Mode names encode both unit and multiplier (MIN_15, MONTH_2); monthly modes densify at 24h, not the unit itself
PIMS 시간 기록/제출/일괄 갱신 등 모든 쓰기 API는 미리보기 → 사용자 확인 → 재시도 가능한 실행 플로우를 반드시 거친다. `--dry-run`은 API 쓰기 호출 자체가 금지.
Scouter server loads hot-reloadable script plugins (.plug files) for alerts/filters and compiled JAR plugins for stateful data handlers (sinks, connection-pool-heavy integrations)
nkia-skills 같은 공용 플러그인에는 범용 스킬만. 프로젝트 특화 스킬은 각 프로젝트의 `.claude/skills/`에 둔다.
Editing a common collection policy can silently drop individual `saveRaw`/interval settings if not re-applied
Roll PostgreSQL major-version support forward incrementally (9.x → 18) rather than pinning one LTS
PublishedViewPage renders a frozen deploy snapshot; RealTimeViewPage renders the live editable dashboard
pushLocalChangesIntoRemote and its action-mapping helpers were removed; mutate Yorkie via doc.update directly
Unknown target RDBMS versions fall back to a documented default bucket rather than erroring, keeping collection alive
Scouter chose an Eclipse RCP desktop client over a browser UI to enable high-throughput binary streams, local caching, and real-time drill-down without HTTP/JSON overhead
A refresh call must issue a new ACCESS token only, never a new refresh token.
Don't bind-mount i18n/exception/menu resource files into Spring Boot containers; let the jar ship its own defaults
Root span isError must aggregate descendant errors; otherwise scatter and list views disagree on a trace's error state
When reconciling parent→child configurations, persistence is conditional on "new" or "resourceName/tags changed". Unconditional save caused unnecessary write load and spurious change events.
Scouter APM enforces strict agent → server → client separation, with an optional standalone HTTP webapp for horizontal scaling of query load
publish/install/원격 목록 조회처럼 원격 git repo를 만질 때는 `mktemp -d → git clone --depth 1 → 작업 → rm -rf`. 작업 디렉토리를 오염시키지 않는다.
A global unique index on group `name` was present and had to be dropped; uniqueness is correct only within the same parent.
SimpleDateFormat mutates Calendar state and corrupts under concurrency — use java.time.DateTimeFormatter
원격 저장소 정보는 `.claude/skill-registry.yaml`, 스킬별 런타임 옵션(출력 경로 등)은 `.claude/skill-config.yaml`. 파일 단위로 관심사 분리.
SNMP `ifIndex` can change across device reboot/reconfig — never use it as a stable identifier
Span-dedup hash must be stable; changing the hash definition yields duplicates during rollout and breaks historical joins
std::span is a non-owning view — common C++20 hazards (dangling temporaries, vector realloc, implicit construction from rvalues) and the safe usage patterns that avoid UB.
.spec.ts files are excluded from the Jest runner in this project — only .test.ts is discovered
MySQL/MariaDB SQL digest hashes fit in an unsigned 32-bit range but arrive as signed Java int — negatives are legal and must not be dropped
Session history rows must omit sqlHash and queryTime when SQL text is missing, else they orphan in downstream joins
Do not put a unique index on sqlHash for SQL Server text-info collection — duplicates are legitimate
@Value on static fields causes init-order and visibility races — always inject into instance fields
The `system_notification` config (SMTP/SMS credentials) is intentionally shared between 2FA and password-find flows rather than duplicated per flow
TABULAR measurement type is intentionally excluded from searchable metric-definition list endpoints
TagValueInfo's `values` array was extracted from the parent tag document into a separate `tag_value_detail` collection to bound document size and index cost.
Multi-tenant thread-locals must be cleared in a HandlerInterceptor `afterCompletion`, regardless of request outcome
Identify special/system tenants by a boolean flag on the entity, never by matching on name.
@Testcontainers clashes with @SpringBootTest context caching — use static start() + @DynamicPropertySource
Mixed time units (ns/μs/ms) across ingest, storage, filters, and UI are a recurring bug class — pick one canonical internal unit
Clients send a `mode` enum (RAW..YEAR); the server maps it to a (bin-interval, query-range) pair and picks the right pre-aggregated collection
Report-generation services should raise Tomcat connection/read timeout to ~1 hour because export of large OZ/Jasper reports is genuinely long-running
For Top/Bottom selection queries, pick the collection whose bin granularity covers the widest range, not the finest-grained one
TopN Mongo pipeline using `$unwind`+`$match` explodes documents; push predicate into `$filter` first
In report immediate-generation, the topResource flag decides whether to query by resource-id (fast path) or the full conf-id set (slow path)
Thread-local trace context is lost across executor.submit / reactor.flatMap boundaries; scouter injects bytecode wrappers around async entry points to capture and restore it
Traefik 2.11 silently drops idle backend connections without an explicit idleTimeout on the entrypoint/serversTransport
Scouter streams periodic metrics over UDP (lossy but cheap) and reserves TCP for config fetch, agent registration, and XLog profile uploads that demand delivery guarantees
UDP collectors behind Traefik/containers must raise SO_RCVBUF well above the 8KB default or drop packets under burst load
Scouter's DataOutputX uses 3-byte (INT3) and 5-byte (LONG5) integer encodings to shrink UDP metric packs by 20-40% when most values fit within 24 / 40 bits
vLLM serving chose fp8_e4m3 KV cache + prefix caching + MTP speculative decoding for Qwen3.5 throughput
Widgets are snapshots of a group at save time; later edits to the source group do not propagate
XLog is scouter's per-request transaction trace format — hierarchical typed steps stored as compressed binary, indexed by end-time, with flat metadata for server-side filtering
Yorkie holds live canvas state; the team server holds metadata (projects, assets, datasources) — never mix
